summary: CompassX AI Project Intelligence Platform - Initial test suite generated. All 19 backend API tests and 36 frontend E2E tests pass. Authentication via MongoDB-seeded session token works correctly. All 7 core pages (Dashboard, AI Creator, Sprint Planner, Resource Manager, Portfolio, AI Copilot, Landing) load correctly.

issues: Seed Demo Data button (data-testid=seed-demo-button) is conditionally rendered — only visible when projects.length === 0. This is intentional per code, but worth noting for testing context.

seed_data_creation: Created test user (test-user-1772823453557, test.user.1772823453557@compassx.com) and session token (test_session_1772823453557) in MongoDB. Also seeded demo data via /api/seed-demo-data endpoint (3 projects, 6 resources, 36 tasks).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user session: test_session_1772823453557. All authentication via cookie (session_token) set on domain project-copilot-ai-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth check via /api/auth/me takes ~30s on first load - use waitForResponse pattern. The seed-demo-button is conditionally shown only when projects.length === 0. Backend URL: https://project-copilot-ai-1.preview.emergentagent.com
